parameters.content:
A4 — Quittances de loyer

Quotidien 9h. Dès que le jour d'échéance du bail est atteint,
génère la quittance via l'endpoint /api/receipt de l'app (vrai PDF)
et l'envoie au locataire. 1 quittance/bail/mois (idempotence).

parameters.query:
SELECT l.id, l.agency_id, l.property_id, l.monthly_rent, l.charges, l.rent_due_day,
       p.title AS prop_title,
       t.id AS tenant_id, t.first_name, t.last_name, t.email AS tenant_email,
       to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM') AS period_key,
       'A4:receipt:' || l.id || ':' || to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM') AS run_key
FROM leases l
JOIN properties p ON p.id = l.property_id
LEFT JOIN contacts t ON t.id = l.tenant_id
WHERE date_part('day', now()) >= l.rent_due_day
  AND l.start_date::timestamptz <= now()
  AND (l.end_date IS NULL OR l.end_date::timestamptz >= now())
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM automation_runs ar WHERE ar.run_key = 'A4:receipt:' || l.id || ':' || to_char(now(), 'YYYY-MM'));

WITH run AS (
  INSERT INTO automation_runs (id, agency_id, automation_type, ref_id, run_key, executed_at, created_at)
  VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.agency_id) }}, 'A4', {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.id) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.run_key) }}, now()::text, now()::text)
  ON CONFLICT (run_key) DO NOTHING
),
msg AS (
  INSERT INTO messages (id, agency_id, channel, to_contact_id, to_name, to_address, subject, body, attachment_url, automation_type, sent_at, created_at)
  VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.agency_id) }}, 'email', {{ $('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_id ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_id) : 'NULL' }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_name) }}, {{ $('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_email) : 'NULL' }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.subject) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.body) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.attachment_url) }}, 'A4', now()::text, now()::text)
)
INSERT INTO activity_log (id, agency_id, automation_type, description, ref_id, occurred_at, created_at)
VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.agency_id) }}, 'A4', {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")('Quittance envoyée à ') }} || {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.tenant_name) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($('Préparer la quittance').item.json.id) }}, now()::text, now()::text);

meta.note: Génère et envoie la quittance mensuelle (PDF réel via /api/receipt).
